typekit.css_usage_note: Always load the stylesheet above in the <head> of every generated HTML file to activate all font families.

anton.description: Ultra-condensed, single-weight display sans-serif. The #1 scroll-stopping font for giant price numbers (₹49, ₹99), percentage callouts (60% OFF), and hero discount text. Replaces Impact in modern web-based ad creatives.

variants.note: Anton is single-weight only. Use font-weight: 400 always.

poppins.description: Geometric rounded sans-serif. Primary headline and CTA font for CLG Canteen ads. Bold/700 for offer headlines; Regular/400 for sub-copy and descriptions. Matches the modern, student-friendly personality of the brand.

nunito.description: Rounded, warm geometric sans-serif. Friendly and approachable. Excellent for student-facing offer headlines, value proposition copy, and sticker-style callout text aligned with CLG Canteen's local, accessible personality.

nunito-sans.description: Slightly more neutral version of Nunito. Excellent for UI text, app-style labels, price breakdowns, and table comparisons (e.g., Toing-style side-by-side fee comparison ads).

pacifico.description: Casual, flowing script font. Ideal for sticker-style taglines, handwritten callouts, 'Free Delivery' curl tags, and any copy that needs a warm, local, hand-crafted feel. Matches the Toing and Chaayos reference ads.

caveat-brush.description: Rough, brush-stroke handwritten font. More authentic and raw than Pacifico. Perfect for 'TODAY ONLY', 'GRAB IT NOW', urgency stickers, and food menu blackboard-style annotations.

grandstander-variable.description: Variable font with rounded, playful geometry. Weight range 100–900. Use at weight 800–900 for fun energetic display headlines (event-based, seasonal ads). Excellent for CHOOSE TOING-style CTAs and bold banner headers.
grandstander-variable.note: This is a variable font. Use font-weight: 100–900 as needed. No separate bold variant required.

liberation-sans.description: Metrically compatible Arial/Helvetica replacement. Clean, legible neutral sans-serif for body copy, T&C fine print, offer conditions, and UI labels.

roboto.description: Google's neutral humanist sans-serif. Extremely legible at any size. Used for utility text, T&C footnotes, and CTA button labels where clean readability is paramount.

roboto-extralight.description: Weight 200 variant of Roboto. Ultra-light for luxury/editorial contrast against bold headline weights.

eskorte-latin.description: Contemporary serif with elegant Latin refinements. Used for editorial headlines and brand name treatments in premium ad layouts.

cambria.description: Transitional serif. For pricing footnotes, testimonial quotes, and elegant body copy.

georgia.description: Classic humanist serif. For testimonials, social proof copy, and warm body text blocks.

oso-sans.description: Modern geometric sans-serif. Clean and versatile. Available in regular and bold with italic variants.

oso-sans-condensed.description: Condensed variant of Oso Sans. Excellent for offer banners, price callouts in tight spaces, and condensed headline text. A modern alternative to Barlow Condensed.

oso-sans-semicondensed.description: Semi-condensed variant of Oso Sans. Ideal for subheadlines and offer copy where you need more width than condensed but less than full-width.

oso-serif.description: Modern serif. For editorial and premium layout elements.

oso-serif-condensed.description: Condensed serif. For tight editorial headlines and narrow price-display layouts.

newsserif-huge-variable.description: Variable serif optimized for very large display sizes. Weight range 100–900. For big editorial banner headlines.
newsserif-huge-variable.note: Variable font. Use font-weight: 700–900 for maximum impact at large display sizes.

newsserif-large-variable.description: Variable serif for large display sizes. Weight range 100–900.

newsserif-text-variable.description: Variable serif optimized for text/body sizes. Weight range 400–900.

css_token_mapping.note: Use these mappings in the :root {} block of every generated ad_creatives.html file. Brand: CLG Canteen — Dark Brown #5c4129, Yellow Ochre #bf935b, Off White #fff3e5.

html_integration.note: This single Typekit stylesheet loads ALL font families listed in this file. Do NOT load any Google Fonts links alongside it. Do NOT duplicate fonts.
